chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Applications 119 and 108 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1467/2025 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.1468/2025 20.11.2025 Mr. Amjad Ali Khan Ruk, advocate for the applicant in SCRA 119 of 2025 and for respondent in SCRA 108 of 2025 Mr. Zohaib Korai advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for applicant in SCRA 108 of 2025 and for respondent in SCRA 119 of 2025 It is jointly sought that the impugned judgment be set aside and the matters be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within sixty days. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
